title: Breaking UFO Story: ‘Immaculate Constellation’ UFO Program (Ft. Michael Shellenberger)
summary: Michael Shellenberger discusses his release of the 'Immaculate Constellation' report, a leaked document describing a secret UAP program allegedly managed by the Department of Defense and held at the White House. The interview covers government secrecy around UAPs, whistleblower protections, the need for transparency, and comparisons to other government coverups like the Hunter Biden laptop story.

acronyms.definition: The current official government terminology for UFOs and related unexplained aerial phenomena
A highly classified program that is not acknowledged to exist by the government
A secret Pentagon program that investigated UFOs

acronyms.expansion: Advanced Aerospace Weapon System Applications Program
acronyms.definition: A Pentagon program related to UAP research associated with Bigelow Aerospace
Joint US-Canadian organization providing aerospace warning and defense
A law that gives citizens the right to access information from federal government agencies
Term used to describe potential non-human entities associated with UAP phenomena
United States domestic intelligence and security service
United States federal department responsible for military and national security
United States federal department responsible for energy policy and nuclear programs

key_claims.claim: Immaculate Constellation is a USAP (Unacknowledged Special Access Program) controlled by the White House but administered by the Department of Defense
A high-quality video exists shot from a helicopter showing an orb coming out of the ocean about 20 miles off the coast of Kuwait being joined by another orb, in high definition full color
The Pentagon has additional UAP videos beyond the three released publicly but refuses to release them for national security reasons
Government secrecy around UAPs has been growing, not declining, contrary to the narrative of ongoing disclosure
The government is justifying UAP secrecy under law enforcement provisions rather than just national security
Glenn Gaffney at the CIA was the gatekeeper who blocked the transfer of a craft that Lockheed had collected in the 1950s to ASAP/Bigelow Aerospace
Barack Obama prosecuted more government leakers and whistleblowers than all presidents combined before him
Lou Elizondo responded 'I can neither confirm nor deny' when asked if he was read into Immaculate Constellation
Garrett Graff, who wrote a UFO debunking book, was involved in pre-bunking the Hunter Biden laptop story with the Aspen Institute
There are rumors of a secretive project within the Department of Defense involving manipulation of human genetics with non-human genetic material
